name: Island Snow
tagline: Obama's Kailua go-to — every presidential visit = a stop here. Also a legit surf shop.
mustOrder: any flavor with vanilla ice cream on the bottom (the Island Snow signature)
li hing mui powder on top
parking: Parking in the Kailua Shopping Center lot next door
talkStory: A Kailua institution way before the Obama fame, doubling as a surf/skate shop since the '90s. The shop sponsors local surf groms and is deeply embedded in the Kailua community. Combine with a Kailua Beach day — it's a 5-minute walk. Every order comes with a scoop of vanilla ice cream buried at the bottom of the cone — that's the Island Snow signature. Add li hing mui powder on top for the local move.
